title: Create and sync zendesk tickets originating from a new board item
excerpt: Hello, we have a board that is generating new items when the associated monday form is being used by our end users. We have activated our zendesk integration on the board to be used to create and track new zendesk ticket…

posts.author: FrankM_MI (Frank Marcelli)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, we have a board that is generating new items when the associated monday form is being used by our end users. We have activated our zendesk integration on the board to be used to create and track new zendesk tickets when a new item is created in it. Currently the existing automation recipes allow us to pull new tickets based on the specified criteria and create new items and track the associated zendesk tickets for those items.

We would like to have a feature such that: when a new item is created in the source board (i.e. by form submission), it will generate a ticket in zendesk and automatically sync and update that zendesk ticket in the same board item.

We have non-Monday users that need to receive zendesk ticket for form submissions that come in via Monday. Right now the current recipes and automation options don’t automatically sync back the ticket created based on the item’s details we specify. It was requested by the product team to create this topic/feature request to review and see if we can have this in the future.

Happy to visualize this or discuss further. We will be on zendesk for the foreseeable future so being able to originate and automatically sync zendesk tickets in an associated monday item would be very helpful for us for tracking and reporting.

posts.author: sachinkarma (sachin kumar karma)
posts.cookedHtml: @FrankM_MI Zendesk and monday.com integration Connect , Automatically transform Zendesk tickets into engineering tasks, keep track of progress from one place, notify team members on changes or delays, update your users directly from monday.

posts.author: FrankM_MI (Frank Marcelli)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Sachin,

Thanks for the reply, however I’m unsure how this is addressing my request to the Monday product team.

posts.author: sachinkarma (sachin kumar karma)
posts.cookedHtml: @FrankM_MI yes we can addressing you request to the mondey team, we can connect to call please let me know

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @FrankM_MI

Being an authorized partner company, we assure you that our dedicated monday.com integration experts can address this problem. Our experts have in-depth knowledge of integrating Zendesk with monday.com. They can configure the integration and add some workflows to automate the process of ticket creation, tracking, and reporting. Implementing the custom integration enables you to sync data across both Zendesk and monday.com and maintain a single source of data truth.

Please connect with our experts today to discuss this further.

posts.author: FrankM_MI (Frank Marcelli)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you folks for the replies. I’m not looking to have a third party paid solution address the opportunity, but if that changes in the future I’ll let you know. Thank you!

posts.author: ShubhCoder (Shubham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, @FrankM_MI — not sure if you’re still looking for a solution to this, but just in case (and for others who come across this thread):

Our app, Zendesk Sync, now supports exactly this workflow — you can automatically create a Zendesk ticket when a new item is created in a monday.com board (including via form submissions). Plus, updates from the item (like comments and attachments) can be synced back into Zendesk, keeping everything aligned.

It’s super helpful for teams with non-monday users working in Zendesk, since everyone stays in sync without manual work of copy pasting.

Hope this helps anyone still exploring options! Happy to share more if needed.
